types.title: AXHierarchyChartNode
types.description: Represents a node in the hierarchy chart

props.name: label
props.description: Display label for the node (alternative to name)

props.name: value
props.description: Value associated with the node (used for calculations if needed)

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Optional tooltip text to display on hover

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional subtitle text to be displayed

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon to be displayed with the node

props.name: type
props.description: Optional type category for the node

props.name: color
props.description: Optional color to apply to the node

props.name: isExpanded
props.description: Whether the node is initially expanded (if it has children)

props.name: metadata
props.description: Additional metadata (can be used for custom rendering or logic)

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: TypeScript interface definition for hierarchy chart nodes
